signUpBody: Aletheia is currently in beta testing, and we are welcoming all journalists and fact-checking professionals to test the platform!
signUpFooter: Our goal is to open the platform for all users to add and review claims as soon as testing is complete. Follow us on social media!
aboutUsTitle: Learn more about the Aletheia project
aboutUsBody: Aletheia is a movement and an open-source platform that provides free tools so any citizen can fight disinformation and strengthen democracy.
button: Sign-up to be part of the movement
aboutUsButton: I want to learn about Aletheia
